task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the Epi Info 7 project and form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Epi Info 7 Form Designer is open. The Project Explorer pane shows 'NorovirusOutbreak' as the active project and 'CaseInvestigation' as a form.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of basic Text, Number, and Date fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form canvas displays input fields labeled exactly 'CaseID', 'LastName', 'FirstName', 'Age', and 'OnsetDate'.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of the Legal Values field for Sex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form canvas displays an input field labeled 'Sex'. As a Legal Values field, it should appear as a drop-down list on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of Yes/No fields for symptoms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form canvas displays input fields labeled 'Nausea', 'Vomiting', 'Diarrhea', 'AbdCramps', and 'Fever'. These should appear as drop-down lists.

task_completion.description: Verify the addition of Yes/No fields for exposures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The form canvas displays input fields labeled 'AteChicken', 'AtePastaSalad', 'AteRolls', and 'DrankPunch'. These should appear as drop-down lists.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Epi Info 7 Form Designer GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the Epi Info 7 interface, using the 'New Project' dialog, and dragging/adding fields from the left-hand menu.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by editing the project file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent using a text editor (like Notepad) or a script (like PowerShell/Python) to write the .prj XML file directly.

integrity.description: Verify the fields are actually placed in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The fields must be visibly placed on the Epi Info 7 form canvas, not just typed into a text document or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Epi Info 7 projects are saved as .prj files with an accompanying .mdb database. The project path should be C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Epi Info 7\Projects\NorovirusOutbreak\NorovirusOutbreak.prj. The form 'CaseInvestigation' must contain exactly 15 fields. In Epi Info 7, 'Yes/No' and 'Legal Values' fields appear as drop-down lists on the form canvas. 'Text', 'Number', and 'Date' fields appear as standard text boxes.
